reviewChecklist: **`wrangler.toml`** — if the upstream modified this file, make sure your local values for `database_id`, KV `id`, and any custom `[env.*]` sections are preserved (not overwritten with upstream placeholders).
**`migrations/`** — any new SQL files will be applied automatically on the next `npm run deploy`. Confirm they are compatible with your D1 instance.

**Secrets / environment variables** — check whether the upstream introduced new required values (scan the diff for `BOOTSTRAP_`, `SECRET`, `process.env.`) and configure them in Cloudflare before deploying.
**Breaking changes** — scan the commit messages above for `BREAKING CHANGE`, major version bumps, or schema-affecting refactors.

scheduleNote: Edit the cron expression directly in .github/workflows/sync-fanout.yml — GitHub Actions does not support dynamic schedules.
